description: A modal overlay displaying a staff profile picture at full size with a close button.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Profile picture modal with a staff photo

stories.name: WithCloseHandler
stories.description: Profile picture modal with an onClose callback wired up

props.alt: Profile picture of Headshot of Rosaleen Duffy

notes: The close button uses class 'close' (not 'close-button') and contains a Font Awesome icon <i class="fas fa-times-circle">. The aria-label on the close button is always 'Close image modal' — hardcode it. The img has width=600 and height=600 hardcoded in the DOM — these are fixed CMS image style dimensions and should be hardcoded. The 'responsive' attribute on img is a Drupal attribute and should be preserved verbatim.
